title: Implement API for Image Uploads with Resizes and Rate Limiting
constraints: Must use multipart/form-data for image uploads.
Must use a rate limiter to limit 10 requests per minute per IP.
Must store the uploaded images on disk in the uploads folder.
Must handle image resizing using a third-party library.
Must return a 404 status code for non-existent images.

endpoints.requestBody: multipart/form-data containing image/jpeg or image/png file
